Description (Card): As a user, I want to register with username, password, and role so that I can access the system
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Username must be unique; Role must be admin/seller/buyer; Registration should not create a session; System should confirm successful registration

Description (Card): As a registered user, I want to login so that I can access system features securely
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Valid credentials should allow login; Invalid credentials should show error; Only one active session allowed; User must be logged in to access protected features

Description (Card): As an admin/seller, I want to add, update, and delete car listings so that cars can be managed
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only admin/seller can perform operations; Car ID must be unique; Updates should reflect immediately; Unauthorized users should be denied access

Description (Card): As a logged-in user, I want to browse available cars so that I can explore options
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only logged-in users can browse; Only available cars should be displayed; Car details must be accurate

Description (Card): As a user, I want to view detailed information of a car so that I can make a decision
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Valid car ID should display details; Invalid ID should show error; Viewed cars should be stored in recent list

Description (Card): As a buyer/admin, I want to purchase a car so that I can own it
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only buyer/admin can purchase; Car must be available; After purchase car becomes unavailable; Order must be created and linked to user

Description (Card): As a buyer/admin, I want to manage my wishlist so that I can track preferred cars
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only buyer/admin can access wishlist; Cars can be added/removed; Removing non-existing item handled gracefully; Wishlist should persist during session

Description (Card): As a user, I want to see recently viewed cars so that I can revisit them easily
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Recently viewed cars should be tracked per session; List updates on each view; Only logged-in users can access
